summary: Verified and fixed two bugs: Bug 1 - Gestor can view petitions they created (fixed backend check from created_by to user_id), Bug 2 - 'Ver / Editar' flow for predios nuevos from 'Mis Asignaciones' works correctly (modal opens with pre-filled data)

minor.issue: Original fix checked 'created_by' field but petitions use 'user_id' for creator. Fixed to check both fields for backwards compatibility.

console_errors.impact: Low - These are permission-based endpoints that gestores don't have access to. Not a bug, expected behavior.

bug_1_gestor_view_own_petitions.description: Gestor can view details of petitions they created
bug_1_gestor_view_own_petitions.original_issue: GET /api/petitions/{petition_id} checked 'created_by' field but petitions store creator in 'user_id'
bug_1_gestor_view_own_petitions.fix_applied: Modified line 2435 in server.py to check both 'user_id' and 'created_by' for backwards compatibility

test_results.test_gestor_creates_petition: PASSED - Gestor can create and view their own petition
test_results.test_gestor_cannot_view_others: PASSED - Gestor correctly denied access to others' petitions
test_results.test_gestor_can_view_assigned: PASSED - Gestor can view petitions assigned to them

bug_2_ver_editar_predios_nuevos.description: 'Ver / Editar' button from 'Mis Asignaciones' opens modal with pre-filled data
bug_2_ver_editar_predios_nuevos.flow_tested: Pendientes > Mis Asignaciones > Click 'Ver / Editar' > Modal opens with predio data

test_results.ui_test: PASSED - Modal opens with 'Predio nuevo cargado para edición' toast
test_results.data_prefill: PASSED - Código predial nacional and other fields pre-filled correctly

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Bug 1 fix: Changed is_creator check from 'created_by' to 'user_id' (with fallback to created_by for backwards compatibility)
✓ Bug 2: Frontend useEffect in Predios.js correctly handles predio_nuevo URL parameter
Note: Console shows 403 errors for cambios/pendientes and reapariciones endpoints - this is expected for gestor role (permission-based)
seed_data_creation: Created test petitions and predios nuevos during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs verified fixed. Bug 1: The GET /api/petitions/{petition_id} endpoint now correctly allows gestores to view petitions they created by checking user_id field (not just created_by). Bug 2: The 'Ver / Editar' button in Pendientes > Mis Asignaciones correctly navigates to /dashboard/predios?predio_nuevo={id} and the useEffect in Predios.js loads the predio data and opens the creation modal with pre-filled data. Note: Marcelino's role is 'gestor' not 'gestor_apoyo' - the system uses gestor_apoyo_id field to track assignment, not a separate role.
